label: Chinese chess
prompt:
A 3:2 horizontal editorial illustration that explains ONE idea: "Xiaoxiang commits to a move in Chinese chess."

Composition: Xiaoxiang is large and confident, leaning over a traditional Chinese chessboard and carefully placing one round red chess piece with a raised front paw. Six to eight other round chess pieces rest clearly on the board as a simple battle formation. The board is a standalone square prop on a warm paper ground, viewed in a gentle three-quarter angle. Keep generous empty warm-paper space around the action. No text, no title, no labels, no logo, no UI.

CHARACTER (locked, keep exactly on the reference model): the recurring mascot — Xiaoxiang, the baby elephant mascot from the reference image: soft rounded elephant body, oversized ears, curled trunk, small tusks, rounded limbs and feet, red-and-white propeller beanie, and short red cape; keep the same face, proportions, costume, and children's-book plush illustration treatment as the reference. The ONLY accent-colored character parts are the red beanie and red cape. It MUST perform the move, not decorate. Follow the reference image for character value and color treatment. The mascot is a solid opaque foreground character; the chessboard and pieces must not pass through its body. The chess piece is clearly held by one paw and separated from the torso.

LINE LANGUAGE: clean black cartoon outlines with rounded corners and slightly varied hand-drawn weight. Everything is drawn by the same hand; no glossy vector edges and no technical diagram lines.

STYLE: polished children's-book plush mascot illustration, warm and soft with gentle cel-shaded volume, subtle fabric texture, and a plain warm cream paper background. No photorealism, no 3D render, no poster typography.

PALETTE: warm cream paper #faf9f5. Near-black structure ink #141413 for outlines and facial detail. Restrained warm board colors #d1aa57 and #8b3a2d. Preserve Xiaoxiang's light body, red-and-white beanie, and short red cape as the only red mascot accents.


Aspect ratio: 3:2.

label: Tank Battle game cover
prompt:
A 3:2 horizontal game-cover editorial illustration that explains ONE idea: "A lone defender holds the base against an incoming armored wave."

Composition (editorial scene): a classic top-down tank-battle arena, rendered as a single dramatic three-quarter overview. Xiaoxiang drives a large olive-green player tank in the lower-left foreground, its cannon aimed diagonally toward three smaller brick-red enemy tanks advancing through staggered burnt-orange brick walls in the upper-right. A small gold eagle base sits protected behind Xiaoxiang near the bottom center, framed by a compact U-shaped brick barricade. One bright shell crosses the open lane between tanks. The player tank and Xiaoxiang are large and confident, occupying roughly 60% of the frame; leave a calm warm-paper region in the upper-left with no text.

CHARACTER (locked, keep exactly on the reference model): the recurring mascot -- Xiaoxiang, the baby elephant mascot from the reference image: soft rounded elephant body, oversized ears, curled trunk, small tusks, rounded limbs and feet, red-and-white propeller beanie, and short red cape; keep the same face, proportions, costume, and children's-book plush illustration treatment as the reference. The ONLY accent-colored character parts are the red beanie and red cape. Xiaoxiang MUST actively drive the tank from an open hatch, with both arms clearly holding the controls; no prop or background line crosses or fuses into the elephant body. Preserve the reference image's elephant value structure and keep the body light enough to sit naturally on a warm paper ground.

LINE LANGUAGE: draw EVERYTHING -- Xiaoxiang, tanks, brick barricades, base, and shell -- in clean black cartoon outlines with rounded corners and slightly varied hand-drawn weight. All objects feel drawn by the same hand; avoid thin scratchy lines and hard technical diagram lines.

STYLE: polished warm children's-book plush mascot illustration. Soft fabric texture, gentle cel-shaded volume, subtle hand-drawn interior detail, friendly color, and a simple warm paper background. No photorealism, no 3D render, no glossy UI/vector style, no logo, no title, no poster typography.

PALETTE: warm cream paper #fbf7ee. Near-black #171510 for outlines and facial detail. Olive green #627a3b on the player tank. Brick red #b94a35 on enemy tanks and barricades. Gold #d1a843 only for the base, shell flash, and tiny tank markings. Keep Xiaoxiang's red-and-white beanie and red cape exactly as in the reference.

LABELS: no text, no letters, no numbers anywhere in the image.


Aspect ratio: 3:2.

label: Super Mario platform game
prompt:
Create a polished children's-book plush editorial illustration for a browser platform game cover. The recurring mascot, Xiaoxiang, the baby elephant mascot from the reference image, is the sole hero: soft rounded elephant body, oversized ears, curled trunk, small tusks, rounded limbs and feet, red-and-white propeller beanie, and short red cape; preserve the same face, proportions, costume, and soft plush treatment as the reference. Xiaoxiang is actively sprinting and jumping over a bright green pipe toward a floating golden question block, with an original colorful side-scrolling platform world: rounded grass-topped brick platforms, a friendly red mushroom, small gold coins in an arc, puffy clouds, distant hills, and a warm sunny blue sky. Dynamic left-to-right movement, cheerful and high energy, clear cover composition with Xiaoxiang large and centered. No text, no logos, no copyrighted game characters, no UI, no watermark. Storybook-plush style: soft dimensional plush surfaces, thick clean dark outlines, warm friendly light, tactile fabric detail, elegant children's picture-book finish. Keep the mascot's red beanie and cape as its only accent-colored costume elements.


Aspect ratio: 16:9.

Five placed stones already rest on the board in a clear near-diagonal line — three black, two white — shown as a quiet ongoing five-in-a-row battle. A second loose white stone sits beside the board's near edge awaiting the opponent. Calm warm-paper negative space in the upper-right with no text, no title, no labels, no UI, no logo, no watermark.

The ONLY accent-colored character parts are the red beanie and red cape. Xiaoxiang MUST actively perform the move, with the held stone clearly separated from its paw and not fused into its body. STYLE: polished children's-book plush mascot illustration, warm and soft with gentle cel-shaded volume, subtle fabric texture, and a plain warm cream paper background. label: Tetris game cover
prompt:
A 3:2 horizontal game-cover editorial illustration that explains ONE idea: "Xiaoxiang drops a T-shaped tetromino into a 3D block-stack well."

Composition (editorial scene): a warm three-quarter view of an open-fronted 3D rectangular well (the classic 10-wide by 20-tall tetris playfield) tilted slightly toward the viewer. Xiaoxiang is large and centered in the upper-left, leaning forward intently; one paw holds a single T-shaped tetromino (a horizontal bar of three cube-cells with one cube centered below) just above the top of the well, ready to drop. Six to eight already-placed tetromino blocks rest clearly stacked at the bottom of the well in two compact horizontal layers, in a mix of warm wood, gold, and rust reds with a single muted teal as the only cool accent. The well is a low warm-brown wooden frame on a warm cream-paper ground. Calm warm-paper negative space in the upper-right with no text, no title, no labels, no UI, no logo, no watermark, no copyrighted game designs.

CHARACTER (locked, keep exactly on the reference model): the recurring mascot -- Xiaoxiang, the baby elephant mascot from the reference image: soft rounded elephant body, oversized ears, curled trunk, small tusks, rounded limbs and feet, red-and-white propeller beanie, and short red cape; keep the same face, proportions, costume, and children's-book plush illustration treatment as the reference. The ONLY accent-colored character parts are the red beanie and red cape. Xiaoxiang MUST actively perform the action, with the held T-tetromino clearly separated from its paw and not fused into its body. Preserve the reference image's elephant value structure and keep the body light enough to sit naturally on a warm paper ground.

LINE LANGUAGE: draw EVERYTHING -- Xiaoxiang, well frame, tetrominoes, ground -- in clean black cartoon outlines with rounded corners and slightly varied hand-drawn weight. Everything is drawn by the same hand; no glossy vector edges, no 3D-render curves, no technical diagram lines.

STYLE: polished children's-book plush mascot illustration, warm and soft with gentle cel-shaded volume, subtle fabric texture, and a plain warm cream paper background. Tetromino blocks are simplified rounded cubes with a soft dimensional bevel, not glossy 3D plastic. No photorealism, no UI overlays, no logos, no copyrighted designs.

Palette (locked hexes only): warm cream paper #F4E7C6, wood frame warm brown #B07A3E and darker grain #7E4F22, charcoal cartoon outline #263238, and the tetromino colors -- rust red #C0392B, sunflower gold #F0C75E, dark crimson #8E2A20, burnt orange #D2483A, warm wood #B07A3E, deep brown #4A2A14, and ONE muted teal accent #5A8F95 used only on a single placed block for contrast. Keep around 8 colors total.

No text, no title, no captions, no labels, no logo, no UI, no watermark, no signature.
